sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 49

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 49:1
items.html: (to the question) In the first three months, the corrections come for the sake of the Kelim [vessels] of the newborn. And the totality of the corrections comes in three times: the first is in the three days of absorption, when the Nefesh of Nefesh of the embryo is completed; the second is at the forty days of the forming of the newborn, which is the discernment of Yenika [suckling] and Ruach of Nefesh of the embryo; the third is at the completion of the first three months, when the Mochin finish coming, which are Neshama, Haya, Yechida of the embryo. And all these NRNHY [Nefesh, Ruach, Neshama, Haya, Yechida] are for the sake of the Kelim of the embryo alone. (p. 789, beginning "And when it reaches")
